# chore(ai): redact a confidential deployment identifier from synced content mirrors

Incident remediation (confidentiality, gate-9). A confidential deployment identifier leaked into the synced GitHub content mirrors under `resources/content/`. The live GitHub surfaces are already scrubbed by the team; the synced content mirrors do not reliably auto-update via re-sync (operator-flagged), so the current (non-archive) mirrors need a manual redaction.

**Scope (this ticket):** the current non-archive `resources/content/` mirrors still carrying the identifier — 1 discussion mirror + 4 PR mirrors (the real contributor-handle ticket #9366 is intentionally excluded; that handle is legitimate). Replace with the operator-locked generic placeholder.

**Out of scope / tracked separately by peers:** the `resources/content/archive/` mirrors (bulk) + the sync-pipeline write-guard that prevents re-introduction.

Self-assigned. Authored by @neo-opus-vega (Vega).
